modmenu.descriptionTranslation.not-enoug: Not Enough Vulkan, OptiFine'ın göz alıcı seçeneklerinin çoğunu Sodium'a getirmeyi hedefliyor; görsel hata düzeltmeleri ve henüz Sodium'da bulunmayan diğer performans seçenekleri gibi bazı özelliklerin sağlanmasına ek olarak.
options.particles.minecraft.ambient_enti: Fenerler tarafından yayılan ve durum etkileri.
options.particles.minecraft.angry_villag: Köylüler üremeyi başaramadığında veya bir iş yeri ulaşılamaz olduğu için sahipsiz kaldığında ortaya çıkar.
options.particles.minecraft.ash.tooltip: Ruh Kumu Vadisi biyomunda havada süzülür.
options.particles.minecraft.block.toolti: Bloklar kırıldığında veya fırçalandığında, demir golemler yürüdüğünde, varlıklar yükseklikten düştüğünde, oyuncular veya kediler koştuğunda, zırh standları kırıldığında ve koyunlar çim yediğinde ortaya çıkar.
options.particles.minecraft.block_crumbl: Bir Gıcırtı Kalbi yok edildiğinde, onun Gıcırdayanı ile birlikte ortaya çıkar.
options.particles.minecraft.block_marker: Ana elde tutulduklarında bariyer ve ışık bloklarını işaretler.
options.particles.minecraft.bubble.toolt: Sıçrayan varlıkların etrafında ve su altı hareketlerinde görünür. Ayrıca gardiyan lazerleri, olta şamandıraları, balık izleri, su altı mermileri ve Ender Gözleri tarafından da yayılır.
options.particles.minecraft.bubble_colum: Yukarı doğru olan baloncukları temsil eder.
options.particles.minecraft.campfire_cos: Kamp ateşi ve ruh kamp ateşi tarafından yayılır.
options.particles.minecraft.campfire_sig: Saman balyalarının üzerine yerleştirilmiş kamp ateşleri ve ruh kamp ateşleri tarafından yayılır.
options.particles.minecraft.cloud.toolti: Islak süngerler Nether’da kuruduğunda ve Kötü Kehanet etkisiyle bir köye girildiğinde ortaya çıkar.
options.particles.minecraft.composter.to: Bir gübre variline eşyalar eklendiğinde ortaya çıkar.
options.particles.minecraft.crit.tooltip: Kritik vuruşlar ve bazı saldırılarla oluşur. Ayrıca arbalet atışlarının ve tamamen şarj edilmiş okların arkasında iz bırakır.
options.particles.minecraft.current_down: Aşağı doğru olan baloncukları temsil eder.
options.particles.minecraft.damage_indic: Yakın dövüş saldırıları bir varlığa hasar verdiğinde ortaya çıkar.
options.particles.minecraft.dragon_breat: Ender Ejderhası’nın nefes saldırıları, ejderha ateş topları ve kalıcı Ejderha Nefesi bulutları tarafından yayılır.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_dri: Düşmeden önce sivri damlataş üzerinde oluşan lav damlacıklarını temsil eder.
Düşmeden önce sivri damlataş üzerinde oluşan su damlacıklarını temsil eder.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_hon: Düşmeden önce dolu arı kovanları ve arı kovanlarının altında oluşan bal damlacıklarını temsil eder.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_lav: Düşmeden önce, üstünde lav bulunan blokların altında oluşan lav damlacıklarını temsil eder.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_obs: Düşmeden önce ağlayan obsidyen üzerinde oluşan gözyaşlarını temsil eder.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_wat: Düşmeden önce yağmur sırasında yapraklarda, üstünde su bulunan bloklarda ve ıslak süngerlerde oluşan su damlacıklarını temsil eder.
options.particles.minecraft.dust.tooltip: Emitted by powered redstone components such as dust, torches, repeaters, levers, and redstone ore.
options.particles.minecraft.dust_plume.t: Produced when adding items to decorated pots.
options.particles.minecraft.egg_crack.to: Produced when sniffer eggs are placed on moss blocks and when they crack.
options.particles.minecraft.elder_guardi: Displayed when an Elder Guardian inflicts Mining Fatigue.
options.particles.minecraft.electric_spa: Produced by lightning rods during thunderstorms and when lightning strikes copper.
options.particles.minecraft.enchant.tool: Floats from bookshelves to enchanting tables.
options.particles.minecraft.enchanted_hi: Produced when hitting an entity with certain damage enchants (e.g., Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, or Impaling).
options.particles.minecraft.end_rod.tool: Emitted by end rods and trails behind shulker bullets.
options.particles.minecraft.entity_effec: Emitted by tipped arrows, area effect clouds, lingering potions, spellcasting, and many status-effect sources other than beacons and conduits.
options.particles.minecraft.explosion.to: Produced by explosions and explosion emitters. Also appears during certain large impacts and Ender Dragon death effects.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_drip: Produced when lava droplets fall from pointed dripstone.
Produced when water droplets fall from pointed dripstone.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_dust: Falls from gravity-affected blocks such as sand and gravel.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_hone: Produced when honey drips fall from full bee nests and beehives.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_lava: Produced when lava droplets fall from blocks with lava above.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_obsi: Produced when tears fall from crying obsidian.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_wate: Produced when water droplets fall from blocks with water above, from leaves during rain, and from wet sponges.
options.particles.minecraft.firefly.tool: Spawns from firefly bushes when the internal light level is 13 or lower.
options.particles.minecraft.firework.too: Trails behind fireworks and is produced when firework stars explode.
options.particles.minecraft.fishing.tool: Represents the fish trail while fishing.
options.particles.minecraft.flame.toolti: Emitted by torches, furnaces, and other fire sources. Also appears in spawners and around magma cubes.
options.particles.minecraft.flash.toolti: Produced when fireworks with firework stars explode.
options.particles.minecraft.glow_squid_i: Produced when a glow squid is hit.
options.particles.minecraft.gust.tooltip: Created when a wind charge impacts a block.
options.particles.minecraft.gust_emitter: Created when a wind charge impacts a block and emits multiple gust particles.
Created when a wind charge impacts a block and emits a small burst of gust particles.
options.particles.minecraft.happy_villag: Produced during positive interactions such as bone-mealing plants, trading, feeding animals, pollination, claiming job sites or beds, and turtle egg placement or hatching.
options.particles.minecraft.heart.toolti: Produced when taming, breeding, feeding, and when allays duplicate.
options.particles.minecraft.infested.too: Emitted by entities with the Infested effect.
options.particles.minecraft.instant_effe: Produced when Instant Health or Instant Damage potions break and trails behind spectral arrows.
options.particles.minecraft.item.tooltip: Produced when tools break, when eating, and when certain thrown or used items break (e.g., potions and Eyes of Ender).
Produced by entities with the Weaving effect.
options.particles.minecraft.item_slime.t: Produced by slimes and by entities with the Oozing effect.
options.particles.minecraft.item_snowbal: Produced when a thrown snowball breaks.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_hone: Produced when falling honey droplets land.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_lava: Produced when falling lava droplets land.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_obsi: Produced when falling obsidian tears land.
Emitted by large fire sources such as blazes and fires. Also appears when water is placed in the Nether and when lava and water create stone variants.
Appears when holding a Light item of any level.
options.particles.minecraft.mycelium.too: Appears above mycelium and trails behind phantoms’ wings.
options.particles.minecraft.nautilus.too: Floats toward conduits and toward entities targeted by a conduit.
options.particles.minecraft.note.tooltip: Produced by note blocks and jukeboxes.
options.particles.minecraft.ominous_spaw: Produced when an ominous item spawner spawns an item during an ominous event.
options.particles.minecraft.poof.tooltip: Produced when mobs die and during various vanish or burst effects (e.g., silverfish entering stone, spawner spawns, certain roars, and fireworks expiring without stars).
options.particles.minecraft.portal.toolt: Produced by portals and teleportation. Also trails behind Eyes of Ender and appears around Ender Pearls, Ender Chests, Endermen, and Endermites.
options.particles.minecraft.raid_omen.to: Emitted by entities with the Raid Omen effect.
options.particles.minecraft.rain.tooltip: Appears on the ground during rain.
options.particles.minecraft.scrape.toolt: Produced when scraping oxidation from copper.
options.particles.minecraft.sculk_charge: Marks the path of a sculk charge.
Produced when a sculk charge ends.
options.particles.minecraft.sculk_soul.t: Appears above sculk catalysts when activated.
options.particles.minecraft.small_gust.t: Emitted by entities with the Wind Charged effect.
options.particles.minecraft.smoke.toolti: Emitted by many heat and magic sources (e.g., torches, campfires, furnaces, brewing stands, blazes, ghasts, withers, and lava). Also appears during certain actions such as primed TNT and portal-related effects.
options.particles.minecraft.snowflake.to: Produced by entities inside powder snow.
options.particles.minecraft.sonic_boom.t: Produced by the Warden’s sonic boom attack.
options.particles.minecraft.soul.tooltip: Produced when running with Soul Speed on soul sand or soul soil.
options.particles.minecraft.soul_fire_fl: Emitted by soul torches and other soul fire sources.
options.particles.minecraft.splash.toolt: Produced by water splashes, rain splashes, fishing activity, and certain water-impact effects. Also produced when wolves shake off water.
options.particles.minecraft.spore_blosso: Floats in the air around spore blossoms.
options.particles.minecraft.squid_ink.to: Produced when a squid is hit.
options.particles.minecraft.sweep_attack: Produced when performing a sweeping attack.
options.particles.minecraft.tinted_leave: Falls from most leaf blocks (except pale oak and cherry) and matches the source leaf’s color.
options.particles.minecraft.totem_of_und: Produced when a Totem of Undying activates.
options.particles.minecraft.trail.toolti: Draws a line between two points, such as between the Creaking and its heart or when eyeblossoms open and close.
options.particles.minecraft.trial_omen.t: Emitted by entities with the Trial Omen effect.
options.particles.minecraft.trial_spawne: Produced when a trial spawner activates.
Produced when an ominous trial spawner activates.
options.particles.minecraft.vault_connec: Produced when a player is near a vault.
options.particles.minecraft.vibration.to: Travels from sound sources to sculk sensors or the Warden, and from note blocks to allays.
options.particles.minecraft.warped_spore: Floats in the air in Warped Forest biomes.
options.particles.minecraft.wax_off.tool: Produced when scraping wax off copper.
options.particles.minecraft.wax_on.toolt: Produced when applying wax to copper with honeycomb.
options.particles.minecraft.white_ash.to: Floats in the air in Basalt Deltas biomes.
Emitted by crafters when ejecting an item.
not-enough-vulkan.option.advanced_item_t: Shows an item’s identifier and durability in its tooltip.
Sets how far from the player clouds are rendered.
not-enough-vulkan.option.cloud_height.to: Sets the height at which clouds are rendered.
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog.tooltip:
Adjusts terrain fog distance per dimension.
Disable Multi Dimension Fog to control fog using Single Fog.
0: Use vanilla fog settings
1–32: Set fog distance in chunks
33: Maximum fog distance (effectively disables fog)
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_start.toolt: Controls how close to the player terrain fog begins.
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.atmosp: Controls fog caused by atmosphere and weather.
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.cloud_: Controls how far fog blends into clouds (end multiplier).
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.defaul: Toggles fog visibility and distance for %s.
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.dimens: Controls fog triggered by dimension effects or boss areas, such as the Ender Dragon fight.
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.enviro: Controls how far environment fog extends (end multiplier).
Controls when environment fog begins (start multiplier).
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.lava.t: Controls fog when submerged in lava.
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.powder: Controls fog when inside powder snow.
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.render: Controls the render-distance border fade (end multiplier).
Controls the render-distance border fade (start multiplier).
not-enough-vulkan.option.fog_type.sky_en: Controls how far fog blends into the sky (end multiplier).
not-enough-vulkan.option.item_frame_name: Shows name tags for item frames.
not-enough-vulkan.option.light_updates.t: Processes lighting updates. Disabling this may cause incorrect lighting when generating chunks. Only disable if you understand the impact.
not-enough-vulkan.option.limit_beacon_be: Limits beacon beams to the world’s maximum height.
not-enough-vulkan.option.linear_flat_col: Uses linear biome color blending without applying linear blending to block faces.
not-enough-vulkan.option.multi_dimension:
Enables per-dimension fog sliders. If disabled, the Single Fog slider is used.
After changing this option, close and reopen the menu to refresh the fog sliders.
Sets which corner the overlay (FPS and coordinates) is shown in.
not-enough-vulkan.option.prevent_shaders: Prevents vanilla shader effects from loading (e.g., spider-view distortion while spectating).
not-enough-vulkan.option.reduce_resoluti:
Uses half resolution on Retina displays to improve performance on macOS.
Changing this option requires a restart.
not-enough-vulkan.option.show_coordinate: Shows player coordinates on the overlay.
not-enough-vulkan.option.show_fps.toolti: Shows the current FPS on the overlay.
not-enough-vulkan.option.show_fps_extend: Shows additional FPS stats (max, average, and minimum) alongside the current FPS on the overlay.
not-enough-vulkan.option.single_fog.tool:
Adjusts terrain fog distance for all dimensions.
Enable Multi Dimension Fog to control fog per dimension.
0: Use vanilla fog settings
1–32: Set fog distance in chunks
33: Maximum fog distance (effectively disables fog)
not-enough-vulkan.option.steady_debug_hu: Refreshes the debug HUD at a fixed interval set by Steady Debug HUD Refresh Interval.
Sets how often the debug HUD refreshes (in ticks).
not-enough-vulkan.option.text_contrast.t:
Adjusts the readability of the FPS/coordinates overlay.
- None: Plain white text
- Background: Adds a debug-style background
- Shadow: Plain white text with a shadow
not-enough-vulkan.option.use_adaptive_sy: Allows V-Sync to switch mid-frame and disable itself at times, often improving responsiveness. May cause issues with some GPU drivers.
not-enough-vulkan.option.use_fast_random: Uses a faster random function for block rendering. This may change how some randomly rotated textures look compared to vanilla.
